items.title: Nasdaq brings proprietary market data onchain through Pyth
items.whyYouShouldCare: Pyth's integration of Nasdaq's proprietary data on-chain enhances Solana's appeal for institutional investors seeking reliable market insights.

items.title: Solana Company to back Kazakhstan’s $6B crypto megacity ambition
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's involvement in Kazakhstan's $6B crypto megacity could significantly boost its ecosystem usage and attract new projects and users.

items.title: Ether, solana and dogecoin slide as Strategy's bitcoin sales plan pressures market
items.whyYouShouldCare: The pressure from bitcoin sales impacting Ether, Solana, and Dogecoin highlights the interconnectedness of crypto assets, affecting liquidity and market sentiment.
